mapper.sql: c.id, c.driver_id AS driverId, d.name AS driverName, d.phone AS driverPhone, d.company_id AS companyId, co.company_name AS companyName, co.team AS team, c.brand_no AS brandNo, c.brand_name AS brandName, c.city_code AS cityCode, c.city_name AS cityName, c.car_no AS carNo, c.plate_color AS plateColor, c.vehicle_type AS vehicleType, c.owner_name AS ownerName, c.certify_date_a AS certifyDateA, c.fuel_type AS fuelType, c.photo_oss AS photoOss, c.with_photo_oss AS withPhotoOss, c.ride_type_id AS rideTypeId, c.business_type_id AS businessTypeId, c.car_state AS carState, c.car_num AS carNum, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt
FROM car c LEFT JOIN driver d ON d.id = c.driver_id AND d.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN company co ON co.id = d.company_id AND co.is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
